violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Did not locate thermometers in beer cooler or kitchen refrigerator.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani Sink found at less than 150ppm Quat. (Made with "2-5 pumps of sanitizer". COS to ~400ppm - with additional 10 pumps.)
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Listed CFSM expired in August 2025.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Screens at hood vent have build up of dust/debris.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani Sink made fresh to facility instructions (5 pumps per sink). Found at ~150ppm Quat Solution. *COS to ~300ppm with additional 5 pumps of chemical.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
